reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para ir en familia y/o amigos.
Mucha cordialidad de la gente que atiende.
Lastima que no ofrecen cenas ni almuerzos.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to go with family and/or friends.
The staff is very friendly.
It's a shame they don't offer lunch or dinner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBanNqRHhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Única estación de servicio de Pto. Pirámides, atendida con desgano por los empleados.

(Translated by Google)
The only service station in Puerto Pirámides, served with a lack of enthusiasm by the employees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBb1AtRXNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Llegamos en octubre y el único baño habilitado es el de discapacitados. Supuesta escases de agua potable en el pueblo, pedimos en la estación y no nos dieron. Llenamos un bidón en un negocio y después en los bomberos. Bastante que desear la atencion de los playeros. Además no tenian nafta súper, solo infinia.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived in October and the only accessible restroom was the one for people with disabilities. There was supposedly a shortage of drinking water in the town, so we asked at the gas station and they wouldn't give us any. We filled a jerrycan at a store and then at the fire station. The service from the gas station attendants left much to be desired. They also didn't have premium gasoline, only regular.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnbnN6NF9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se puede repostar combustible, usar sanitarios limpios, tomar un café y ser atendido cordialmente.

(Translated by Google)
You can refuel, use clean restrooms, have a coffee and be served cordially.

reviews.comment:
buena atención, le envío una foto de unas orcas, q según el playero q era nacido y criado ahí, me dijo q no ilusione a las nenas q no van a ver ninguna. Abrazos.

(Translated by Google)
Great service. I'm sending you a picture of some orcas. According to the beachgoer, who was born and raised there, he told me not to get the girls' hopes up because they won't see any. Hugs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBanJMUDh3RRAB
